title: AkribiaTaskResult
description: Shared output schema for every task in tasks/. profiles/, validation/, viz/, and the GUI's tauri-bridge.ts all read this shape. One schema, many consumers, zero ad-hoc parsing (spec 2.1.1).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC time the result was produced.

task.description: Name of the task that produced this result.

parameters.description: Flat dump of the PrecisionProfile fields plus any task-specific parameters.

seed.description: Deterministic seed used for this run (spec 2.6.1). Required for any run that touches randomness.

trajectory.description: Per-timestep record of the inference dynamics. May be empty for tasks whose output is purely a summary.

summary.description: Task-specific scalar summary metrics (the per-task units the §2.4 ablation methodology compares within).
